professional_summary: Business intelligence and analytics professional with 5 years of experience transforming complex datasets into actionable insights for product and executive teams. Expert in SQL, Python, and Tableau with deep experience in building self-serve analytics infrastructure using Snowflake, dbt, and BigQuery.

work_experience.title: Senior Data Analyst
bullets: Built end-to-end ETL pipelines using dbt and Snowflake transforming 50+ raw data sources into clean analytics models
Designed Tableau dashboards and Looker reports used by 200+ employees for daily business intelligence decisions
Ran A/B testing framework analyzing 30+ experiments quarterly, driving 15% improvement in checkout conversion
Conducted statistical analysis and regression analysis identifying $1.2M in recoverable revenue from pricing model flaws
Mentored team of 2 junior analysts in SQL best practices and data visualization standards

work_experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Wrote 200+ complex SQL queries in BigQuery and Redshift for ad-hoc analysis and executive reporting
Built Python and R scripts for cohort analysis, funnel analysis, and customer lifetime value modeling
Created Power BI dashboards for finance team reducing monthly reporting time from 3 days to 4 hours
Implemented data pipeline monitoring using Apache Airflow, achieving 99.7% pipeline uptime

work_experience.title: Junior Business Analyst
bullets: Performed data visualization and exploratory data analysis using Python (pandas, matplotlib) and Excel
Maintained business intelligence dashboards in Tableau tracking 25 core KPIs for operations team
Automated weekly reporting with Python scripts saving 8 hours per week of manual data processing
Collaborated with data engineering team to define data modeling standards for the analytics warehouse

projects.name: OpenMetrics Framework
projects.description: Open-source dbt package for standardizing e-commerce analytics metrics across Snowflake and BigQuery
